name: Barbecued Texas Cabrito
recipeIngredient: Sop (made with 1 cup butter, 5 large peeled and crushed garlic cloves, 2 large bay leaves, 3 large lemons quartered, 1 large lime quartered, 1 medium onion peeled and sliced, 12 ounces beer, 2 cups corn oil, 1/2 cup Worcestershire sauce, 2 tablespoons chili powder, 1/2 teaspoon cayenne pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the meat completely with the mustard.
2. Mix all spices in a large zip-lock bag, seal and shake until mixed.
3. Place meat in the bag and coat with the rub.
4. Refrigerate overnight.
5. In a two-quart saucepan, melt butter and sauté onions and garlic for five minutes.
6. Add lemons, limes, and beer; simmer until foam subsides.
7. Add remaining ingredients and continue to simmer for 20-25 minutes.
8. Prepare the grill for indirect heat method.
9. Remove meat from the bag and place on the grid.
10. Smoke for 25 minutes at 250 degrees Fahrenheit, basting every 25 minutes.
11. Continue smoking until internal temperature reaches 155 degrees Fahrenheit, then wrap in foil and finish cooking until internal temperature reaches 185 degrees Fahrenheit.
12. Let meat cool for 20 minutes before slicing.
13. Serve BBQ sauce on the side.
